name_cn:
Genuine Grade
CELIN* Upgraded Triumphal Arch Tofu Bag 188423_ Full Leather Black
Imported cowhide material, pure sheepskin lining + vintage steel hardware
The new definition of the Triumphal Arch concept, adding Parisian elements
Vintage style, noble temperament, recognized by the fashion world again
A favorite of many celebrities, classic reinvented, reshaping the classic
Exquisite buckle design, very in line with the fashion forefront ✔️
Size: 18.5-14-6cm (Includes original gift box 🎁)
